name: PayPal
description: Access PayPal orders, invoices, and subscription data via the REST API. Note: requires OAuth2 — get an access token first using your client credentials.

auth.hint: Generate an OAuth2 access token by calling POST https://api-m.paypal.com/v1/oauth2/token with your Client ID and Secret as Basic auth. Use the returned access_token as the Bearer.

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Get details for a PayPal order: amount, currency, status, and payer info.

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List PayPal invoices with their status, amount, and recipient.

tools.name: get_subscription
tools.description: Get details for a PayPal subscription including status and billing cycle.
